prestazioni: M840T 4.0L twin-turbocharged V8 hybrid powertrain recalibration via McLaren Special Operations (MSO) Stage 2 ECU flash, targeting 1,100+ hp (up from 1,035 hp) with bespoke fuel mapping for 102-octane race fuel, paired with a Weistec Engineering hybrid battery bypass module to eliminate power sag under sustained load

Garrett GTX5533R turbochargers with billet 76mm compressor wheels and 64mm turbine wheels, mated to custom Inconel 625 exhaust manifolds and a Tial MV-R 60mm wastegate setup, supporting 32 psi of boost with a secondary 2.5-bar MAP sensor upgrade for precise pressure monitoring

Ohlins TTX46 MkII coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and high-speed valving), paired with McLaren-approved spherical bearing upper control arms (P1GTR-derived) and a full carbon-fiber anti-roll bar kit from Dymag, reducing unsprung weight by 18% while increasing lateral stiffness by 22%
estetica: Full carbon-fiber aero package from Vorsteiner, including a Speedtail-specific front splitter with integrated dive planes (tested in McLaren’s wind tunnel to generate 45 kg of downforce at 250 km/h), a rear diffuser with active Gurney flap, and a fixed rear wing with dual-element design (replacing the stock retractable unit) for +30% downforce at 300 km/h

Bespoke livery by Driven Art, featuring a matte ‘Velocity Silver’ base with ‘Track Edition’ ghosted graphics in McLaren’s proprietary ‘Papaya Spark’ (a metallic-orange hue with micro-flake pigment), applied via 3M 2080 series wrap with a satin clear coat for UV resistance and self-healing properties

Dymag Carbon-Graphite hybrid wheels (20” front, 21” rear) with center-locking titanium nuts, wrapped in Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires (245/35 R20 front, 315/30 R21 rear) in a custom ‘Track Edition’ compound (Pirelli’s ‘R01’ formulation, optimized for 100°C+ track temps), paired with AP Racing CP9660 carbon-ceramic brake rotors (410mm front, 390mm rear) and monoblock 6-piston calipers with titanium pistons
